name: gambit
description: Structured development workflows for Codex with durable tasks, TDD, review, and verification.

interface.shortDescription: Disciplined planning, TDD, review, and delivery workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Gambit to turn ideas and bugs into durable task plans, execute one verified wave at a time, review independently, and finish branches safely.
defaultPrompt: Help me refine a feature idea into an implementation plan.
Continue the next verified task in my current plan.
Investigate this bug and prove its root cause.
